title: Twelvefold Better Combat
description: A port of Combat Test onto 1.12
body:
This mod is not related to other mods with similar names.  
This mods ports some features from [Combat Tests](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_Combat_Tests) to the 1.12.2 version.  
This mod may have compatibility issues due to a large amount of Mixins are used.

## Implemented features:
1. Provides a non-linear health bar.![tfbc-health-bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2774f5c5720584c5875757e63daa5e28f0e1785_0.webp)
2. Removed "3 seconds invulnerability" after rebirth.
3. Shields can now only block 5 points of melee damage, while a shield with a flag could block double.
4. Cleaving enchantment for axes.
5. Now axes always disable shields for 32 ticks instead of 25% disabling a shield for 5 seconds.
6. Attack damage and attack speed adjustment for pickaxes, axes, shovels, swords and hoes.
7. Improved accuracy of arrows.
8. When drawing a bow for longer than 2 seconds, accuracy will decrease.
9. Arrows can no longer cause a critical damage.
